targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS value FROM wikimedia_events WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
SELECT count(DISTINCT user) AS value FROM wikimedia_events WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
SELECT count(*) AS value FROM wikimedia_events WHERE wiki_type = 'new' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
SELECT round(avg(CASE WHEN bot THEN 100.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS value FROM wikimedia_events WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
SELECT round(avg(CASE WHEN user ~ '^[0-9]' THEN 100.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS value FROM wikimedia_events WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
SELECT round(avg(CASE WHEN comment ILIKE '%revert%' OR comment ILIKE '%undo%' OR comment LIKE 'Reverted%' THEN 100.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS value FROM wikimedia_events WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)

SELECT timestamp AS time,
  sum(CASE WHEN NOT bot THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Human Edits",
  sum(CASE WHEN bot THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Bot Edits"
FROM wikimedia_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
SAMPLE BY $__interval
SELECT server_name, count(*) AS edits FROM wikimedia_events WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY server_name ORDER BY edits DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT wiki_type, count(*) AS count FROM wikimedia_events WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY wiki_type ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN wikidata_label != '' THEN wikidata_label ELSE title END AS label,
  title, wikidata_description AS description, server_name, count(*) AS edits
FROM wikimedia_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND namespace = 0 AND NOT bot AND wiki_type = 'edit'
GROUP BY title, wikidata_label, wikidata_description, server_name
ORDER BY edits DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT sum(CASE WHEN comment ILIKE '%revert%' OR comment ILIKE '%undo%' OR comment LIKE 'Reverted%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS value FROM wikimedia_events WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
SELECT round(avg(CASE WHEN comment ILIKE '%revert%' OR comment ILIKE '%undo%' OR comment LIKE 'Reverted%' THEN 100.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS value FROM wikimedia_events WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
SELECT sum(CASE WHEN bot AND (comment ILIKE '%revert%' OR comment ILIKE '%undo%' OR comment LIKE 'Reverted%') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS value FROM wikimedia_events WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
SELECT sum(CASE WHEN NOT bot AND (comment ILIKE '%revert%' OR comment ILIKE '%undo%' OR comment LIKE 'Reverted%') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS value FROM wikimedia_events WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)

SELECT timestamp AS time,
  sum(CASE WHEN bot THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Bot",
  sum(CASE WHEN NOT bot AND user ~ '^[0-9]' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Anonymous",
  sum(CASE WHEN NOT bot AND user !~ '^[0-9]' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Registered"
FROM wikimedia_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
SAMPLE BY $__interval

SELECT timestamp AS time,
  sum(CASE WHEN NOT bot AND user ~ '^[0-9]' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Anon Edits",
  sum(CASE WHEN comment ILIKE '%revert%' OR comment ILIKE '%undo%' OR comment LIKE 'Reverted%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "All Reverts",
  sum(CASE WHEN bot AND (comment ILIKE '%revert%' OR comment ILIKE '%undo%' OR comment LIKE 'Reverted%') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Bot Reverts"
FROM wikimedia_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
SAMPLE BY $__interval

panels.title: Vandalism Pressure: Anon Edits vs Reverts vs Bot Reverts

targets.rawSql:
SELECT CASE WHEN wikidata_label != '' THEN wikidata_label ELSE title END AS label,
  server_name, count(*) AS total_edits,
  sum(CASE WHEN comment ILIKE '%revert%' OR comment ILIKE '%undo%' OR comment LIKE 'Reverted%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS reverts,
  round(avg(CASE WHEN comment ILIKE '%revert%' OR comment ILIKE '%undo%' OR comment LIKE 'Reverted%' THEN 100.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS revert_rate
FROM wikimedia_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND namespace = 0
GROUP BY title, wikidata_label, server_name
ORDER BY reverts DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT round(sum(1) / 5.0, 1) AS value FROM wikimedia_events WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('m',-5,now())
SELECT round(sum(CASE WHEN NOT bot AND user !~ '^[0-9]' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) / 5.0, 1) AS value FROM wikimedia_events WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('m',-5,now())
SELECT round(sum(CASE WHEN bot THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) / 5.0, 1) AS value FROM wikimedia_events WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('m',-5,now())
SELECT round(sum(CASE WHEN user ~ '^[0-9]' AND NOT bot THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) / 5.0, 1) AS value FROM wikimedia_events WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('m',-5,now())

SELECT timestamp AS time,
  sum(60000.0) / $__interval_ms AS "Total",
  sum(CASE WHEN NOT bot AND user !~ '^[0-9]' THEN 60000.0 ELSE 0.0 END) / $__interval_ms AS "Human",
  sum(CASE WHEN bot THEN 60000.0 ELSE 0.0 END) / $__interval_ms AS "Bot",
  sum(CASE WHEN NOT bot AND user ~ '^[0-9]' THEN 60000.0 ELSE 0.0 END) / $__interval_ms AS "Anon"
FROM wikimedia_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
SAMPLE BY $__interval

SELECT CASE WHEN wikidata_label NOT IN ('', '-') THEN wikidata_label ELSE title END AS label,
  server_name,
  sum(CASE WHEN timestamp >= dateadd('m',-15,now()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS edits_15m,
  sum(CASE WHEN timestamp >= dateadd('m',-75,now()) AND timestamp < dateadd('m',-15,now()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS edits_prev_60m,
  round(sum(CASE WHEN timestamp >= dateadd('m',-15,now()) THEN 4.0 ELSE 0.0 END) /
    (sum(CASE WHEN timestamp >= dateadd('m',-75,now()) AND timestamp < dateadd('m',-15,now()) THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) + 1.0), 1) AS spike_ratio
FROM wikimedia_events
WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('m',-75,now()) AND namespace = 0
GROUP BY title, wikidata_label, server_name
ORDER BY edits_15m DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Trending Articles — spike ratio (last 15m vs baseline)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT title,
  count(DISTINCT server_name) AS wiki_count,
  count(*) AS total_edits
FROM wikimedia_events
WHERE timestamp >= dateadd('m',-15,now()) AND namespace = 0
GROUP BY title
ORDER BY wiki_count DESC, total_edits DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Cross-wiki Trending — same topic across languages (last 15m)
